result_summary_zh: Removed false activation_probability_boost. Parsed two DEF components: def_buff_1 probability 75%, def_buff_2 probability 100% with scaling basis activation_count.
Lv50 value now parses. Negative ATK is represented as atk_debuff.
Parsed fixed_damage_1 and damage_reduction_2. Preserved cool/eco-only formation filters and active/accessed trigger direction.
Parsed three components: def_buff_1, atk_debuff_2, damage_reduction_3. Each labeled probability resolves to 70%.
False activation_probability_boost is gone, but labeled_component_count_mismatch remains. Needs parser rule or manual snippet for effect (2) duration extension.
False activation_probability_boost is gone and (1)/(2) ATK components parse, but (3) reboot/probability effect remains intentionally unresolved; keep manual/special parser case.
Link trigger now records event_hint=link and access_direction=own_team_link. Additional station ownership/accessed nuance still needs schema/parser refinement if source distinguishes it.
Still only def_buff_1 is emitted. labeled_component_count_mismatch and compound_labeled_effect_needs_manual_review remain, as intended for follow-up.
Lv30 and Lv50 range values now parse, including decimal/range handling.
Fullwidth labels parse. Emits def_buff_1 with linked_denko_count scaling and def_buff_2 with self_linking station ownership condition.
